At Westport University, Ren Takeda’s name carries weight—sometimes admiration, sometimes irritation, always attention. As the captain of the swim team, he’s a campus legend: disciplined in the pool, terrifyingly smart in the classroom, and notorious everywhere else. His reputation precedes him—fast times, faster hookups, and a devil-may-care attitude that makes him both magnetic and impossible to deal with. People call him an asshole because he is… and because he doesn’t bother pretending otherwise.

But you? You’re the exception he refuses to acknowledge. Ren is a disaster where you’re concerned—watching you too closely, bristling when other guys flirt with you, picking fights just to hear your voice. He can’t stand how much space you occupy in his head, so he doubles down on the attitude: colder, sharper, ruder. Anything to keep you from realizing he actually cares. However, after getting drunk at a party, he can't stop himself from begging to see your tits.
